name: codex-elixir-phoenix
description: Elixir/Phoenix/LiveView development with Codex skills, bundled specialist checklists, Iron Laws, hooks, and Tidewave MCP guidance.

interface.shortDescription: Elixir, Phoenix, LiveView, Ecto, Ash, Oban, and OTP workflows for Codex.
interface.longDescription: A Codex-compatible port of Oliver Kriska's Claude Elixir/Phoenix plugin. It bundles focused skills for planning, review, verification, debugging, dependency auditing, LiveView patterns, Ecto and Ash patterns, Oban, deployment, and security, plus lifecycle hooks adapted to Codex's hook contract and upstream-shaped specialist agent checklists for inline or authorized subagent use.
defaultPrompt: Use Codex Elixir Phoenix to review this Phoenix change.
Use Codex Elixir Phoenix to debug this failing mix test.
Use Codex Elixir Phoenix to plan this LiveView feature.
